message:
feat(tests): add cancel witness lifecycle tests and FINALIZING invariants

cancel: Add 12 new tests to test_cancel.c covering cancel witness protocol:
- Witness create, phase/reason query
- Monotone phase advancement (requested→cancelling→finalizing→completed)
- Backward/same-phase transition rejection
- Release invalidation and post-release query rejection
- Null argument and invalid ID rejection
- Kind/phase string helper coverage (known + unknown values)

Total test_cancel.c coverage: 24 tests (12 existing + 12 new). bd-7w06.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
